'''dhabadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oontz|oontz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oontz|oontz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhabadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbædhæth|dhæbædhæth]] || [[word:dhæbædhæj|dhæbædhæj]] || [[word:dhæbædhæsh|dhæbædhæsh]] || [[word:dhæbædhæ|dhæbædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhababadhath|dhababadhath]] || [[word:dhababadhaj|dhababadhaj]] || [[word:dhababadhash|dhababadhash]] || [[word:dhababadha|dhababadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhabadhath|dhabadhath]] || [[word:dhabadhaj|dhabadhaj]] || [[word:dhabadhash|dhabadhash]] || [[word:dhabadha|dhabadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabafdhath|dhabafdhath]] || [[word:dhabafdhaj|dhabafdhaj]] || [[word:dhabafdhash|dhabafdhash]] || [[word:dhabafdhaf|dhabafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhabadhatha|dhabadhatha]] || [[word:dhabadhaja|dhabadhaja]] || [[word:dhabadhasha|dhabadhasha]] || [[word:dhabadhaka|dhabadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhabadhath|dhabadhath]] || [[word:dhabadhaj|dhabadhaj]] || [[word:dhabadhash|dhabadhash]] || [[word:dhabadha|dhabadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhabadhathal|dhabadhathal]] || [[word:dhabadhajal|dhabadhajal]] || [[word:dhabadhashal|dhabadhashal]] || [[word:dhabadhakal|dhabadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhabadhathatha|dhabadhathatha]] || [[word:dhabadhajaja|dhabadhajaja]] || [[word:dhabadhashasha|dhabadhashasha]] || [[word:dhabadhaka|dhabadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhabadhathan|dhabadhathan]] || [[word:dhabadhajan|dhabadhajan]] || [[word:dhabadhashan|dhabadhashan]] || [[word:dhabadhakan|dhabadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhabadhathaoro|dhabadhathaoro]] || [[word:dhabadhajaoro|dhabadhajaoro]] || [[word:dhabadhashaoro|dhabadhashaoro]] || [[word:dhabadhakaoro|dhabadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
